feed.title: grace.hylandd
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from grace.hylandd

entry.title: Replying to @1greydog its literally dormant babe 🤨

entry.title: I’m taking a break from giving birth for now ☺️
entry.content: I’m taking a break from giving birth for now ☺️

entry.title: Let’s normalise putting in effort. Australia needs it. The way some of yall be leaving the house 🙅🏼‍♀️
entry.content: Let’s normalise putting in effort. Australia needs it. The way some of yall be leaving the house 🙅🏼‍♀️

entry.title: If you can love us in private, but you can’t defend us publicly… WE DON’T WANT YOU! Ladies, I know some of y’all be settling for these kinda men. Knock it off! You deserve so much better 😙🏳️‍⚧️
entry.content: If you can love us in private, but you can’t defend us publicly… WE DON’T WANT YOU! Ladies, I know some of y’all be settling for these kinda men. Knock it off! You deserve so much better 😙🏳️‍⚧️

entry.title: #stitch with @Mikaela Testa had to respond to this as soon as I saw it
entry.content: #stitch with @Mikaela Testa had to respond to this as soon as I saw it

entry.title: Persephone is very scared. She has come from horrible living conditions where she even got Giardia due to neglect. Shes all healed now and ready to join my squad 🐱
entry.content: Persephone is very scared. She has come from horrible living conditions where she even got Giardia due to neglect. Shes all healed now and ready to join my squad 🐱

entry.title: Replying to @69ninjaturtle1 Many years ago the goal was to make people believe that I am a woman. As I’ve grown older I’ve really had to let go of that. It’s a fight that I will never win. Now all I care about is living a life that fulfills me. Surround y
entry.content: Replying to @69ninjaturtle1 Many years ago the goal was to make people believe that I am a woman. As I’ve grown older I’ve really had to let go of that. It’s a fight that I will never win. Now all I care about is living a life that fulfills me. Surround y

entry.title: Wore this to mass this morning ✝️🖤
entry.content: Wore this to mass this morning ✝️🖤

entry.title: You just have to make the most of the cards you have been dealt
entry.content: You just have to make the most of the cards you have been dealt

entry.title: When your mum’s a baddie 😭💕
entry.content: When your mum’s a baddie 😭💕

entry.title: How do i teach her that the litter box isnt a bed???
entry.content: How do i teach her that the litter box isnt a bed???

entry.title: There was a time where i used to ‘hunt’ men. All it got me was a broken heart and time ill never get back. Women were not made to hunt, men were, so let them. They enjoy it, we don’t.
entry.content: There was a time where i used to ‘hunt’ men. All it got me was a broken heart and time ill never get back. Women were not made to hunt, men were, so let them. They enjoy it, we don’t.

entry.title: 🥀 who cares
entry.content: 🥀 who cares

entry.content: She fd me up fr

entry.title: Am I crazy???
entry.content: Am I crazy???

entry.content: Always a humbling experience

entry.title: At what point does it end???
entry.content: At what point does it end???

entry.title: Cvnt
entry.content: Cvnt

entry.title: Enjoy some big sister advice on men 💕
entry.content: Enjoy some big sister advice on men 💕

entry.title: Can we not be used as political ammo? Thanks!
entry.content: Can we not be used as political ammo? Thanks!

entry.title: The things they’ve called me over the years #trans #glowup #transformation
entry.content: The things they’ve called me over the years #trans #glowup #transformation

entry.title: I was in a disgustingly stuck up mood throughout this video! It was the outfit, not me 👀
entry.content: I was in a disgustingly stuck up mood throughout this video! It was the outfit, not me 👀

entry.title: Replying to @ryank620 Would you deny a diabetic child insulin? #trans #model #runway
entry.content: Replying to @ryank620 Would you deny a diabetic child insulin? #trans #model #runway

entry.title: Considering what shes been through I dont blame her 😔
entry.content: Considering what shes been through I dont blame her 😔

entry.title: I hope she comes out of her shell soon 😭😭
entry.content: I hope she comes out of her shell soon 😭😭

entry.title: Just a thought
entry.content: Just a thought

entry.title: 3 months ago I sent that video to @Evangeline James and @AJ Clementine after I made one of the scariest decisions in my adult life. I was so scared and they helped me heal every step of the way! I had no idea how much beauty I was in for!
entry.content: 3 months ago I sent that video to @Evangeline James and @AJ Clementine after I made one of the scariest decisions in my adult life. I was so scared and they helped me heal every step of the way! I had no idea how much beauty I was in for!

entry.title: Men always think I’m so dumb 😂
entry.content: Men always think I’m so dumb 😂

entry.title: I feel better because I feel NOTHING!
entry.content: I feel better because I feel NOTHING!

entry.title: What is this dance? Serving you everything and nothing at the same time.
entry.content: What is this dance? Serving you everything and nothing at the same time.

entry.title: The soft life awaits me…
entry.content: The soft life awaits me…

entry.title: Imagine wasting energy on a man who isn’t 100% sure about you. Ew…
entry.content: Imagine wasting energy on a man who isn’t 100% sure about you. Ew…
